testcase.name: test_pets_api_returns_9_pets

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_advisory_page_features.py:28: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pets_have_photos

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"
